description: End-to-end verification, test harness (admin + user), and webhook-based sync/monitoring for the Nylas v3 Gmail integration.

userStories.title: Nylas Health Check Edge Function
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a nylas-health-check edge function that runs diagnostic API calls against a user's Nylas grant so that I can verify the integration works end-to-end.
acceptanceCriteria: New edge function nylas-health-check/index.ts created
Accepts user_id param (admin mode) or uses JWT auth (user mode)
Runs sequential checks: grant exists, grant valid with Nylas API, list messages, create+delete test draft, verify labels/folders
Returns structured JSON with checks array (name, status, latency_ms, error) and overall status
Handles missing grant gracefully (skip for API checks)
Uses getCorsHeaders(req) from _shared/corsHelper.ts
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Platform Admin Integration Test Page
userStories.description: As a platform admin, I want a test page in the admin area where I can run Nylas health checks against any user so that I can diagnose integration issues.
acceptanceCriteria: New admin page or section accessible from Platform Admin menu
User search/select input to pick a user to test
Run Tests button calls nylas-health-check with selected user_id
Results displayed as checklist with pass/fail Lucide icons, latency, and error details
Shows user's current scope_tier, nylas_integrations status, and google_integrations status
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser on localhost:5175

userStories.title: User-Facing Connection Test on Integrations Page
userStories.description: As a user, I want a Test My Connection button on the Integrations page so that I can verify my Gmail integration is working correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Test Connection button appears on Gmail integration card when connected
Calls nylas-health-check using user's own JWT (no user_id param)
Shows inline results: green checkmarks for pass, red X for failures
Failed checks show actionable message (e.g. Grant expired - please reconnect)
Button shows loading state during test execution
Only visible when user has active Google or Nylas integration
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser on localhost:5175

userStories.title: Nylas Message List & Get Verification
userStories.description: DEDUPED — covered by workspace-v2 TSK-0534 (Nylas Routing in Centralized Client)
acceptanceCriteria: action=list supports search_query_native parameter for search
action=list supports in parameter for folder filtering (folder ID for Google)
action=get returns full message body, attachments metadata, and thread context
Response mapping covers all Gmail v1 fields: id, threadId, snippet, from, to, cc, bcc, date, labels, read, starred, has_attachments, body
Pagination via next_cursor mapped to nextPageToken in response
Empty results return { messages: [], nextPageToken: null }
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Nylas Draft Create & Send Operations
userStories.description: DEDUPED — covered by workspace-v2 TSK-0534 (Nylas Routing in Centralized Client)
acceptanceCriteria: action=draft creates draft with subject, body, to, cc, bcc, reply_to
New action send-draft sends existing draft via POST /v3/grants/{grant_id}/drafts/{draft_id}
New action send sends message directly via POST /v3/grants/{grant_id}/messages/send
New action delete-draft removes draft via DELETE /v3/grants/{grant_id}/drafts/{draft_id}
Response format matches Gmail API v1 shape for frontend compatibility
Error responses include Nylas error details (status code, message)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Google-Gmail Proxy Full Coverage
userStories.description: DEDUPED — covered by workspace-v2 TSK-0534 (Nylas Routing in Centralized Client)
acceptanceCriteria: Proxy routes for free-tier: list, get, draft, send-draft, delete-draft, search
action=sync returns clear not supported message with upgrade path
Proxy adds X-Provider: nylas response header for debugging
Failed Nylas proxy calls return original Nylas error, not generic 500
Expired/revoked grant returns 401 with grant_expired error code and reconnect URL
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Nylas Webhook Receiver Edge Function
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a webhook receiver that processes Nylas grant lifecycle events so that stale grants are detected automatically.
acceptanceCriteria: New edge function nylas-webhook/index.ts with verify_jwt = false in config.toml
Handles challenge verification: returns challenge param on GET with 200 OK
Validates x-nylas-signature HMAC-SHA256 header against webhook secret
grant.expired: sets nylas_integrations.is_active = false, resets scope_tier to free
grant.deleted: removes nylas_integrations row, resets scope_tier
grant.created: logs for observability (no-op if already stored)
Stores webhook secret in NYLAS_WEBHOOK_SECRET environment variable
Returns 200 OK for all processed events
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Grant Status Sync & User Notification
userStories.description: As a user, I want to be notified when my Gmail integration loses access so that I can reconnect before it affects my workflow.
acceptanceCriteria: Expired grant reflects nylasConnected = false in integrationStore on next load
Integrations page shows Connection expired - Reconnect banner when is_active = false
GmailUpgradeGate respects is_active flag (shows gate even if row exists but inactive)
Toast notification on first load after expiration
Reconnecting via Nylas OAuth upserts existing row (user_id + provider)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser on localhost:5175

userStories.title: Nylas Webhook Registration & Management
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a setup script and admin UI to register/manage Nylas webhooks so that webhook configuration is reproducible and visible.
acceptanceCriteria: Script scripts/setup-nylas-webhook.ts registers webhook via POST /v3/webhooks with grant triggers
Script outputs webhook secret for environment variable storage
Script supports --dry-run flag
Platform Admin shows active webhook status (registered, failing, failed)
Admin can trigger Send Test Event from UI to validate webhook endpoint
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Integration Status Dashboard in Platform Admin
userStories.description: As a platform admin, I want an overview dashboard showing all users' Nylas integration health so that I can proactively identify issues.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin page shows table: user email, provider, grant status, scope_tier, last_verified_at
Filterable by status (active, expired, disconnected)
Test All button runs batched health checks with progress indicator
Summary stats: total connected, active, expired, never connected
Click user row navigates to individual test results
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser on localhost:5175
